name: Help Fund the Maple Street Mural
title: Fundraiser
summary: A one-page community-fundraiser site with an animated goal thermometer, a working donate button and modal, and a live donor wall that grows as people give.
setup_questions: What's the cause and who does it help? (Name, one-line summary, and a few sentences of story.)
What's the goal amount and how much is raised so far — and when does the campaign end?
What payment link should the "Donate" button use (Stripe / PayPal / GoFundMe)? Leave it as a demo if you don't have one yet.
List a handful of real donors (name + amount, optional note) to seed the donor wall, plus a 4–6 line budget breakdown.
photo_terms: community mural painting on a neighborhood brick wall
volunteers working together on a neighborhood project
children painting at an outdoor art workshop
neighbors gathered together at a community center
sections: Hero with a community photo, the cause, an emotional lede, and the live fundraising widget
Animated progress bar with dollars raised, goal, percentage, donor count, and days left
Cause story with an organizer pull-quote, a 'where the money goes' budget, and a photo gallery
Ways-to-give tiers that open the donate form pre-filled
Donate button + modal (preset/custom amount, name, note, anonymous) with a thank-you state
Donor wall of cards that updates instantly and persists across refreshes
Share section with a working copy-link button and X / Facebook / email links
Footer with org name, contact, and nonprofit fine print
based_on: A realistic, evergreen neighborhood-fundraiser page in the vein of a GoFundMe / community-grant campaign — story, animated goal thermometer, donate flow, and a growing donor wall (the pattern every cause page reaches for).
